title: 4060 8GB local cascade facade handoff

runtime_contract.brain: Ollama dna3:latest with num_gpu=0; CPU/NPU route reserves 4060 VRAM
runtime_contract.voice_and_avatar: bundled VoxCPM2 (:8901) and Ditto (:8902) behind the desktop facade (:8910)

resolved_wiring: Existing Hugging Face-style Ollama model references are migrated to dna3:latest because /api/chat cannot resolve the former tag.
The shell uses only http://localhost:8910/tts for local voice; it must not call raw VoxCPM2 directly.
RefAudioSection preset names are sent as the selected voice ID, rather than being discarded before the facade request.
Naia account key persistence emits an auth-ready event and balance polling has an abortable timeout.
verification: real VoxCPM2 through a temporary facade returned RIFF WAV for ref_ko_485.wav
remaining_acceptance: Run the packaged standalone installer on the target hardware and confirm its managed :8910 facade produces both audible WAV and Ditto video. Do not ask for a new reference WAV: bundled RefAudioSection presets are the intended input.
